data.description: Checks function-level authorization by changing the HTTP method.
Checks object-level authorization by replaying a request with attacker credentials.
Two-step BOLA: extracts an object id from a listing, then reads it directly with attacker credentials.
Checks object-level authorization by injecting duplicate object identifiers.
Checks whether authentication-sensitive endpoints accept missing credentials.
Injects shell metacharacters and detects reflected command output.
Checks whether the server reflects an attacker-controlled Origin with credentials enabled.
Submits common default credential pairs to the auth endpoint and checks for successful login.
Checks for exposed operational metrics endpoints.
Checks whether tampered JWT signatures are accepted.
Checks whether JWT none-algorithm tokens are accepted.
Injects privileged fields into a write request and checks whether they are accepted.
Checks redirect parameters for externally controlled redirects.
Injects an HTML/script marker and checks for unescaped reflection.
Error-based SQL injection: injects SQL metacharacters and detects database errors.
Injects internal/cloud-metadata URLs and detects reflected fetched content (in-band SSRF).
Blind SSRF via out-of-band Interactsh callback; requires OOB detection enabled.
Checks for exposed OpenAPI or Swagger documentation endpoints.
